provenance.field_names_from: Compute Engine v1 Commitment resource: name, plan (TWELVE_MONTH/THIRTY_SIX_MONTH), status (CREATING/NOT_YET_ACTIVE/ACTIVE/EXPIRED/CANCELLED), startTimestamp, endTimestamp
provenance.notes: Shape of 'gcloud compute commitments list --format=json'. The three constants are invariant facts of GCP committed use discounts: they discount usage (BenefitCategory=Discount), apply continuously to eligible usage (Model=Continuous), and commit to an hourly rate (FulfillmentInterval=Hourly). GCP CUDs are billed monthly with no upfront payment, so PaymentModel=No Upfront and PaymentInterval=Monthly. ContractCommitmentLastUpdated and ContractCommitmentApplicability are NOT emitted (not present in the export) — the client supplies them and coverage reporting shows the residual gap. OfferCategory is left out (a commitment may be public or under a negotiated agreement, which the export does not distinguish).
